name: Funny Programming Things
description: Jokes, novelty projects, and playful repositories about programming culture or developer life.

name: Generative AI Stuff
description: Tools, models, interfaces, and references for generative AI workflows, including text, image, audio, and local AI experiments.

name: Groups
description: GitHub organizations and community groups that collect related projects, tools, or learning resources in one place.

name: Interesting Projects
description: Unusual, impressive, or technically interesting repositories worth revisiting for inspiration or reference.

name: Open Source Gamedev Stuff
description: Open-source game development engines, frameworks, tools, and technical examples.

name: Open-Source Games
description: Open-source, decompiled - if the source code is out for the public to see and use, it can fit in this list.

name: Open-Source Software Projects
description: Notable open-source applications and tools that are useful to study, use, self-host, or contribute to.

name: Personal - Custom GitHub Actions
description: GitHub Actions that I've made, all in one place. Enjoy!

name: Personal - Educational Repos
description: Assorted repos on various tech stacks that are designed to teach you, the reader, about whatever the repo is about. Expect code comments and markdown files!

name: Personal - Handy Repos
description: Useful tools, documentation, or other things stored for my own usage. Probably not documented as thoroughly as the "Personal - Educational Repos" list!

name: Useful C# Stuff
description: C# libraries, frameworks, examples, and reference material for .NET and game development workflows.

name: Useful Frontend Stuff
description: Non-React stuff - I have another list for React-specific things!

name: Useful GitHub Actions Stuff
description: GitHub Actions, workflow examples, and automation helpers for CI, releases, reporting, and repository maintenance.

name: Useful Godot Stuff
description: Godot engine tools, plugins, examples, and learning resources for building games.

name: Useful Krita Things
description: Krita plugins, brushes, templates, workflows, and creative tooling for digital art production.

name: Useful NodeJS Stuff
description: Node.js libraries, tooling, examples, and backend development resources worth keeping handy.

name: Useful Programming Concept Stuff
description: Resources that explain broad software engineering concepts, architecture patterns, algorithms, testing, and implementation techniques.

name: Useful ReactJS Stuff
description: React-specific libraries, components, frameworks, examples, and learning resources for building user interfaces with React.

name: Useful Rust Stuff
description: Rust libraries, tools, examples, and learning resources for systems programming and application development.

name: Useful Streaming Stuff
description: Tools, plugins, assets, and integrations useful for livestreaming, recording, overlays, or broadcast workflows.

name: Useful TypeScript Stuff
description: TypeScript libraries, tooling, type utilities, examples, and reference material for stronger JavaScript projects.

name: Useful Unity Stuff
description: Unity packages, tools, samples, shaders, and learning resources for game development.
